_instructions: About section content - tell your professional story and showcase key metrics.
content: Backend Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience designing and delivering production-grade distributed systems using Java, Spring Boot, and AWS. Proven track record optimizing Kafka event pipelines (2.5M+ events/cycle at 10K+ req/min), cutting P99 latency by 80%, and

resolving P0 incidents for 100K+ concurrent users. Expert in REST API design, microservices architecture, Hibernate/JPA, Redis caching, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native deployments on AWS. Currently building AI-integrated backend systems with Google ADK and LangChain4j.
